misc: His usual shot shape could be described as a "power draw".
biography: Jussi, representing St. Laurence Golf, has been a consistent competitor in the Hector Trophée, making four appearances in this distinctive pair competition. Although still actively involved in Hector events, the roster for the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 does not include his name this year.

Over his past competitive outings, Jussi has become synonymous with his formidable "power draw," a shot shape that consistently showcases both considerable distance and precise control. Despite deploying this signature technique with dedication, the ultimate prizes—the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair and the individual Victor Trophy—have, to date, remained uncaptured.

His continued presence within the broader Hector events landscape speaks to a profound dedication to golf and an unrelenting ambition to secure that elusive first title. Jussi's distinctive blend of skill and perseverance ensures that any future return to the Trophée's demanding fairways will be watched with keen anticipation, as he persists in his quest for competitive distinction.
